name: Dizznem Bot
postCreateCommand: wget -q https://johnvansickle.com/ffmpeg/releases/ffmpeg-release-amd64-static.tar.xz && tar xf ffmpeg-release-amd64-static.tar.xz && sudo cp $(find . -name 'ffmpeg' -type f | head -1) /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg && rm -rf ffmpeg-* && sudo apt-get update --allow-insecure-repositories && sudo apt-get install libopus0 libopus-dev -y --allow-unauthenticated && pip install -r requirements.txt --break-system-packages
